ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of branches of the bank */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the bank operates */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Current interest rate offered by the bank */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the bank */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the bank details were last updated */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the bank's headquarters */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of banking license */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bank */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "ceo_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the CEO */,
  "total_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of the bank in the local currency */,
  "total_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities of the bank in the local currency */,
  "total_equity" TEXT /* Total equity of the bank in the local currency */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Name of the rating agency */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank to which the branch belongs */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Services offered by the branch (e.g., loans, savings accounts) */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  "branch_phone" TEXT /* Contact number of the branch */,
  "branch_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "branch_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the branch manager */,
  "branch_opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the branch */,
  "branch_services_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of services offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank associated with this interest rate */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate value */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this interest rate became effective */,
  "interest_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of interest rate (e.g., savings, loan) */,
  "min_loan_amount" TEXT /* Minimum loan amount for which this rate applies */,
  "max_loan_amount" TEXT /* Maximum loan amount for which this rate applies */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., MMK, VND) */,
  "exchange_rate_to_usd" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency against USD */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the currency is used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the exchange rate was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank where the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the service change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., loan, savings) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_changes_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branch_services" (
  "branch_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch-service mapping */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "service_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions or requirements for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branch_services_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, performance) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the template was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the template (Foreign Key to `users`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template used */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id")
)
